allow: Bash(python -c "import pdfplumber; pdf = pdfplumber.open\('planos/ALEJANDRO GONZALEZ BARRIO AVIARIO V3.PDF'\); print\(f'Páginas: {len\(pdf.pages\)}'\); [print\(f'--- Pag {i+1} ---\\n{pdf.pages[i].extract_text\(\)}'\) for i in range\(min\(3,len\(pdf.pages\)\)\)]")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000,3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host "Puertos 8000 y 3000 liberados")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{Port=$_.LocalPort; PID=$_.OwningProcess; Name=$p.Name} })
PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit', '-Command', 'cd "C:\\Users\\santiago.arce\\Desktop\\Proyectos\\Agente Aviario\\frontend"; npm run dev' -WindowStyle Normal)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8003 -State Listen | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -EA SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{Port=$_.LocalPort; PID=$_.OwningProcess; Name=$p.Name; CMD=$p.MainWindowTitle} })

PowerShell(netstat -ano | Select-String ':3000 ' | Select-String 'LISTEN'; Start-Sleep 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000' -TimeoutSec 8 -UseBasicParsing; "OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "err: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($procs = netstat -ano | Select-String ':8004 ' | Select-String 'LISTEN'; $procs -match '\(\\d+\)$' | Out-Null; $procId = $Matches[1]; if \($procId\) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Killed $procId" } else { "No PID found" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit', '-Command', 'Set-Location "C:\\Users\\santiago.arce\\Desktop\\Proyectos\\Agente Aviario\\frontend"; npm run dev' -WindowStyle Normal)

PowerShell($procId = \(netstat -ano | findstr :8005 | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '\\s+'\)[-1] } | Select-Object -First 1\); if \($procId\) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; cd "c:\\Users\\santiago.arce\\Desktop\\Proyectos\\Agente Aviario\\backend"; python -m uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8005)
